# init(mtlDevice:)

**Initializer**

Creates a device from a given Metal device.

## Declaration

```swift
convenience init(mtlDevice metalDevice: any MTLDevice)
```

## Parameters

- **metalDevice**: `MTLDevice` to create an MPSGraphDevice from.

## Return Value

A valid device.
title: init(mtlDevice:)
